rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow the user to add new goods to the inventory.
The system shall allow the user to update the price of existing items in the inventory.
The system shall allow the user to remove goods from the inventory that are no longer required.
The system shall identify expired goods and notify the user about their removal from the inventory.
The system shall allow the user to place an order to a supplier for additional goods when required.
The system shall generate an invoice for the order once it is placed.
The system shall allow the user to search for items available in the inventory and select them for purchase.
The system shall calculate the applicable discount and tax based on the selected items.
The system shall generate a receipt for the customer after the purchase.
The system shall allow the user to replace an item or cancel the receipt during the billing process if needed.
The system shall record customer requests for items that may not be currently available.
The system shall allow the user to view a summary report of all transactions carried out in the system at any point.
The system shall allow the user to update their account password.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can add new goods to the inventory.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: "The user can add new goods along with their details to the inventory"

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can update the price of existing items in the inventory.
The user can remove goods from the inventory that are no longer required.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: "remove goods that are no longer required"

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system identifies expired goods and notifies about their removal from the inventory.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: "The system also identifies expired goods and notifies about their removal from the inventory"

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When required, the user can place an order to a supplier for additional goods.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: "the user can place an order to a supplier for additional goods"

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once the order is placed, an invoice is generated for that order.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: "an invoice is generated for that order"

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can search for items available in the inventory and select them for purchase.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: "the user searches for items available in the inventory and selects them for purchase"

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Based on the selected items, the system calculates the applicable discount and tax.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: "the system calculates the applicable discount and tax"

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After that, a receipt is generated for the customer.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: "a receipt is generated for the customer"

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: During the billing process, the user can replace an item or cancel the receipt if needed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: "the user may replace an item or cancel the receipt if needed"

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system records customer requests for items that may not be currently available.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: "record customer requests for items that may not be currently available"

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: At any point, the user can view a summary report of all transactions carried out in the system.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: "view a summary report that includes details of all transactions carried out in the system"

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can update their account password.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: "the user can update their account password"
